_about: Source-of-truth map for the research-source clones under Research/Vendor/. These are NOT submodules and are NOT committed (Research/.gitignore ignores Vendor/); this file plus clone-vendor.sh are the only things git tracks. Rebuild the corpus with `./clone-vendor.sh`; render the human-facing manifest table with `./clone-vendor.sh --table`. Enriched single-source-of-truth: replication fields + research metadata, replacing the hand-kept table that used to live in notes/000-source-manifest.md.

_fields.path: local directory under the vendor dir (the colis-anr/* entries nest by owner)
_fields.repo: GitHub OWNER/NAME, passed to `gh repo clone`
_fields.commit: pinned commit; checked out detached. Replaces any moving branch ref
_fields.lang: characterizing language / paradigm (why-cloned framing, not necessarily GitHub's current primaryLanguage)
_fields.grade: research grade per notes/000-source-manifest.md (A best human source, B practitioner; null = present-but-ungraded). Quality x relevance, recency not penalized
_fields.license: best-known SPDX id. See licenseNote where GitHub's detector disagreed or returned NOASSERTION/none
_fields.licenseNote: optional caveat: provenance of the license value, or copyleft-contamination flag (Phase-2-critical reuse risk)
_fields.relevance: one-line Dorc relevance; [bracketed] slugs cross-ref sources.json
_fields.filter: optional git partial-clone filter (e.g. blob:none) for the heavy repos; omitted = full history
